implemented_requirements: worker assignment to food wood and stone
camp building placement through Town Hut selection
production buildings and queued unit training
five player unit classes plus scout and siege unit
enemy raids and final assault pressure
free movement top-down squad control with tap and drag selection
enemy Chief Hall landmark destruction victory
menu playing paused game over and victory states
resource ledger right squad rail and bottom-left command controls
tracked UI icon gameplay art and audio assignments
known_limits: campaign map is represented by the single skirmish entry in the first APK build
unit art uses shared top-down sprites with runtime facing and motion feedback rather than custom bronze-age sprite sheets
delivery_note: The first implementation preserves the confirmed economy, building, scouting, squad control, neutral objective, raid pressure, and landmark assault mechanics required before APK export.
